# Renderly

> AI-powered virtual staging for real estate agents, homeowners, and landlords. Based in Winnipeg, Manitoba. Serving all of Canada and the United States.

## What is Renderly?

Renderly transforms empty property listings into beautifully staged spaces using AI. Upload a photo of any empty room, choose a design style, and get photorealistic virtual staging in minutes — not weeks. No design skills required.

Whether you're a real estate agent listing properties, a homeowner selling your home (FSBO), or a landlord marketing a rental — Renderly makes your listing photos stand out for a fraction of the cost of physical staging.

## How It Works

1. Upload — Snap a photo of any empty room and upload it to Renderly.
2. Style — Choose from dozens of design styles: Modern, Traditional, Mid-Century, Scandinavian, and more.
3. Download — Get your professionally staged photo in under 30 seconds. Ready for MLS, social media, or your listing page.

## Key Stats

- 10,000+ rooms staged
- 30-second average processing time
- 98% customer satisfaction
- 95% cheaper than physical staging

## Pricing

Most plans are one-time payments — no subscription required.

- Free: $0 — 1 staged image per property, up to 3 regenerations, no credit card required
- Starter: $19.99 one-time — 3 staged images, 1 property tour (8s 1080p), unlimited regenerations
- Professional: $29.99 one-time — 9 staged images, 1 property tour (24s 1080p), custom branding (Most Popular)
- Enterprise: $75/mo — 9 staged images, 1 property tour (24s 4K), unlimited properties, priority support, white-label solution

## Features

- AI-generated photorealistic virtual staging
- Multiple design styles (Modern, Traditional, Mid-Century, Scandinavian, Contemporary)
- MLS-ready photo exports
- Property video tours
- Custom branding and white-label options
- Batch processing for multiple rooms
- Results in under 30 seconds

## FAQ

### What is virtual staging?
Virtual staging is the process of digitally adding furniture, decor, and finishes to photos of empty rooms using AI. It produces photorealistic images that help buyers visualize a space — typically costing 95% less than physical staging and delivering results in minutes instead of weeks.

### How much does virtual staging cost?
Renderly offers virtual staging starting at $0 (free plan with 1 image) up to $29.99 per property for the Professional plan with 9 staged images. The Enterprise plan at $75/month covers unlimited properties. Most plans are one-time payments — no subscription required.

### Is virtual staging allowed on MLS?
Yes. Most MLS boards in Canada and the US allow virtually staged photos as long as they are clearly labeled as "virtually staged" in the listing. Renderly delivers clean, MLS-ready images that comply with standard disclosure requirements.

### Does virtual staging help sell a house faster?
Yes. Studies show staged listings sell 73% faster and for 5-10% more than unstaged homes. Virtual staging delivers the same buyer engagement benefits as physical staging at a fraction of the cost.

### Do I need any design skills?
No. Renderly is designed for anyone — real estate agents, homeowners, landlords. Upload a photo, pick a style, and the AI handles everything. No design software, no learning curve.

## Service Area

- Winnipeg, Manitoba
- All of Canada
- United States
- Available worldwide
